raw: {"perspective": "Communications Strategist", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes that impact user-facing text and tone-of-voice principles", "rationale": "Ensuring user-facing text aligns with the 7 Tone-of-Voice principles and is free of shame-inducing language is crucial for maintaining a positive and inclusive user experience. Fixes in this area can be implemented autonomously without requiring CEO input or additional resources.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed fixes may lead to continued tone and language inconsistencies, potentially harming user engagement and trust.", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes that impact user-facing text and tone-of-voice principles
rationale: Ensuring user-facing text aligns with the 7 Tone-of-Voice principles and is free of shame-inducing language is crucial for maintaining a positive and inclusive user experience. Fixes in this area can be implemented autonomously without requiring CEO input or additional resources.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed fixes may lead to continued tone and language inconsistencies, potentially harming user engagement and trust.
